sections.title: Portfolio Overview
sections.prose: Ejari operates as a Rent Now Pay Later (RNPL) product in KSA. The platform displays pre-computed analysis from an ODS workbook -- no live computation is performed. All metrics shown are extracted from the workbook sheets.
notes: This is a read-only summary dashboard. No raw loan tape is available for Ejari -- all analysis is pre-computed.

sections.title: Data Source
sections.prose: Analysis is based on a pre-computed ODS workbook with 13 sheets covering portfolio overview, monthly cohorts, loss waterfall, roll rates, historical performance, collections by month and origination, segment analysis, credit quality trends, Najiz & legal recovery, write-offs & fraud, and data notes.
notes: The ODS file is parsed once per session and cached. All monetary values are in USD.
